summary: Iteration 10 - All 9 requested features verified working. Piantina export, varianti panel, resize controls, drag lock, snap grid, planimetrie library, schema preferiti, report charts all functional.
seed_data_creation: Event ID 3 used for testing (has existing tavolo and stazione)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified. Lock Drag defaults to 'bloccato' (locked), Snap Grid defaults to ON. Export uses custom canvas rendering to avoid oklch errors.

1_export_png_pdf_stampa_no_oklch.details: Export PNG/PDF/Stampa buttons present. Clicking them produces no oklch parser errors. Uses custom canvas rendering (generateCanvas) instead of html2canvas.

2_double_click_tavolo_no_varianti.details: Double-click on tavolo does NOT open varianti panel. Verified via Playwright test.

3_varianti_only_from_button.details: Pannello varianti opens ONLY when clicking the 🍽 button on selected tavolo. Panel shows all varianti options with +/- controls.

4_external_resize_controls.details: External resize controls present in sidebar: 'Ridimensiona tutti i tavoli' +/-, 'Ridimensiona tutte le stazioni' +/-, 'Tavolo selezionato' +/- (when selected), 'Stazione selezionata' +/- (when selected), 'Reset dimensioni' button.

5_toggle_drag_lock_snap_grid.details: Lock Drag toggle works (changes between 'Drag bloccato' and 'Drag attivo'). Snap Grid toggle works (changes between 'Snap griglia ON' and 'Snap griglia OFF'). Lock Drag defaults to locked, Snap Grid defaults to ON.

6_planimetrie_library_delete.details: DELETE /api/piantine?url=... works correctly. UI shows delete button for selected planimetria. API returns {success: true} and removes file from /public/planimetrie/.

7_planimetria_names_truncated.details: Planimetria names in select dropdown are truncated to max 32 chars + ellipsis. API truncates to 48 chars. No overly long names breaking UI.

8_schema_preferito.details: Schema preferito feature present: 'Mostra solo Schemi Preferiti' checkbox, 'Schema Preferito' toggle button, 'Copia schema' button. Preferences stored in localStorage.

9_report_charts_no_warnings.details: Report Azienda page loads 4 charts using ResponsiveContainer. No dimension warnings in console. Charts render properly with width='99%' and debounce=100.

api_verification.GET_api_piantine: 200 OK - returns array of {nome, url} objects with truncated names
api_verification.DELETE_api_piantine: 200 OK - deletes planimetria file from public folder
api_verification.GET_api_eventi_id3: 200 OK - returns event with disposizioneSala containing tavoli/stazioni
api_verification.GET_api_eventi: 200 OK - returns events list for schema copying

playwright_tests.piantina_controls: All sidebar controls present: Lock Drag, Snap Grid, resize buttons
playwright_tests.varianti_panel: Opens only from 🍽 button, not from double-click
playwright_tests.export_buttons: PNG/PDF/Stampa buttons clickable without oklch errors
playwright_tests.schema_preferiti: Checkbox and toggle button present and functional

code_implementation_notes.export_canvas: Planimetria export uses custom generateCanvas() function that manually draws to canvas, bypassing html2canvas and oklch color parsing issues
code_implementation_notes.lock_drag_default: lockDrag useState defaults to true (locked) as requested for iPad UX
code_implementation_notes.snap_grid_default: snapToGrid useState defaults to true as requested
